LOOP.COMMENT: Aggregate total payments per customer number

MAP.COMMENT: Extract current payment fields; coerce customernumber to String via %var%

Drop JSON parse intermediates for customers
Convert customers/customernumber to String for switch comparison
Set SUCCESS status and drop remaining intermediates
Set FAILURE status, surface error message, and drop all leaked pipeline variables
